---
title: "engram"
subtitle: "Notebooks and experiments from my work in NeuroAI and brain-computer interfaces."
listing:
  contents:
    - "**/*.ipynb"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

An **engram** is the physical trace a memory leaves in the brain - so this is
where I store what I learn. Each entry is a runnable notebook: a paper
reimplemented, a model dissected, or an idea I was curious enough to chase down.
